title: Unprotected port on EC2 instance {instance_id} is being probed.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} has an unprotected port which is being probed by a known malicious host.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is performing outbound port scans.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is being used to perform outbound port scans on remote host {remote_ip}.

title: API was invoked from a Tor exit node IP address.
description: An API was invoked from a Tor exit node IP address {remote_ip}.

title: API was invoked from a known malicious IP address.
description: An API was invoked from IP address {remote_ip} which is included on your threat intel list.

title: EMR-related sensitive port on EC2 instance {instance_id} is being probed.
description: An EMR-related sensitive port on EC2 instance {instance_id} is being probed by a known malicious host {remote_ip}.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is receiving inbound connections from a Tor exit node.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is receiving inbound connections from a Tor exit node.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is communicating with a disallowed IP address.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is communicating with IP address {remote_ip} on your threat intel list.

title: Unusual console login was seen for principal {principal_id}.
description: A console login was observed for a principal that has not previously been seen.

title: Credentials for instance role {role_name} are being used from an external IP address.
description: Credentials created for an EC2 instance role {role_name} are being used from an external IP address {remote_ip}.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is being subjected to RDP brute force attacks.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is the target of RDP brute force attacks.

title: API was invoked using root credentials.
description: An API was invoked using root credentials.

title: Block public access settings for S3 bucket {bucket_name} were disabled.
description: Block public access settings for the S3 bucket {bucket_name} were disabled by user {user_name}.

title: Account-level block public access for S3 was disabled.
description: Account-level block public access for S3 was disabled for account {account_id}.

title: S3 bucket {bucket_name} has been made publicly accessible.
description: An IAM principal has granted anonymous access to the S3 bucket {bucket_name} by changing a bucket policy or ACL.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is communicating with a known blackhole IP.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is trying to communicate with an IP address of a remote host that is a known black hole.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is communicating with a known drop point IP.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is attempting to communicate with an IP address that is known to hold credentials and other stolen data captured by malware.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is querying algorithmically generated domains.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is querying algorithmically generated domain names. Such domains are commonly used by malware.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is querying a domain associated with cryptocurrency.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is querying a domain name that is associated with Bitcoin or other cryptocurrency-related activity.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is probing a port on a large number of IP addresses.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is probing a port on a large number of publicly routable IP addresses.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is performing WinRM brute force attacks.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is performing WinRM brute force attacks against {remote_ip}.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is querying a domain name associated with Bitcoin mining.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is querying a domain name that is associated with Bitcoin-related activity.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is communicating with a known Bitcoin mining pool.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is communicating with a known Bitcoin-related IP address.

title: CloudTrail trail was disabled.
description: A CloudTrail trail was disabled in your AWS account.

title: Account password policy was weakened.
description: The account password policy was weakened.

title: S3 server access logging was disabled for bucket {bucket_name}.
description: S3 server access logging was disabled for bucket {bucket_name}.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} may be participating in a TCP DDoS attack.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is behaving in a manner that suggests it is being used to perform a Denial of Service (DoS) attack using TCP protocol.

title: EC2 instance {instance_id} is querying a domain associated with a known C&C server.
description: EC2 instance {instance_id} is querying a domain name associated with a known command and control server.
